chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SSTRA No.230 OF 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of Case (Priority) 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No. 2803/2025 18.02.2026 Mr. Muhammad Faheem Bhayo Advocate for Applicant Mr. Muhammad Deen Advocate holds brief for Mr. Rana Sakhawat Ali Advocate for the Respondent M/s. Jawad Hussain Memon, DCIR (HQ) Zone-1, RTO-I, Karachi and Mohsin Ahmed, ACIR, Zone-I, RTO-I, Karachi Pursuant to Order dated 11.02.2026, Mr. Jawad Hussain Memon, DCIR (HQ) Zone-I, RTO-I, Karachi is present. He states that it may be just and proper and in the interest of justice for the impugned order to be set aside and matter be remanded back to the learned Appellate Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad PS
